action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Palmeri, Rivera-Wagner, Brown, Clancy, DeSmidt, Emerson, Joers, Johnson, Kaufert, Kirsch, McCarville, Moore Omokunde, Ortiz-Velez, Roe, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Stubbs, Tenorio, Udell, Neubauer, Hysell, Sheehan and Anderson; 
cosponsored by Senators Spreitzer, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Pfaff, Ratcliff and Roys
